overall.description: A cinematic drive along a desert highway in Cyberpunk 2077, starting with a view of Night City's futuristic skyline across the water, turning right at an intersection, and continuing through the arid Badlands landscape past billboards and highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway approaching futuristic coastal city

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert highway toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: futuristic metropolis with tall glass towers visible across the water
body of water separating the highway from the city
desert yucca trees lining the left side of the road
two-lane paved road with white lane markings
red and white striped concrete highway barriers
hazy mountain range in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit desert highway with the futuristic Night City skyline visible in the distance across a body of water. Joshua trees and scrub brush line the left side of the road while red and white barriers appear on the right. The camera moves steadily forward, maintaining a clear view of the glass towers ahead.

events.description: camera turns right onto the highway exit ramp
futuristic city skyline exits view as camera turns toward the desert mountains

agents.ego_description: steering right at the highway intersection, leaving the city view behind

entered.detail: tall metal billboard frame with empty white display surface

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at a highway intersection, causing the city skyline to exit the frame left. The view opens toward distant desert mountains as the vehicle passes between red and white concrete barriers. A large empty billboard structure becomes visible ahead in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with overhead gantry and signage

events.description: passing the large billboard structure on the left side
approaching and passing under the highway gantry with SOCAL directional signs

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway past infrastructure and signage

entered.detail: overhead metal gantry with directional signs pointing to SOCAL
silver metal highway guardrail along the right shoulder

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives past the large billboard structure on the left and approaches a highway gantry with SOCAL directional signs. Metal guardrails appear along the right side of the road as the concrete barriers shift to the left. The camera passes under the overhead gantry structure around the 40-second mark.

agents.ego_description: cruising along the open highway through the desert landscape

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail along the left shoulder

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle traveling along a straight desert highway flanked by metal guardrails on both sides. The infrastructure from the previous segment is now behind, and the view opens to sparse Joshua trees and distant mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert highway that transitions from a view of a futuristic city skyline to an expansive, arid wilderness. It begins moving steadily forward on a sunlit road lined with Joshua trees and scrub brush, keeping the glass towers of Night City visible across a distant body of water. As the vehicle turns right at an intersection, the skyline exits the frame to make way for a vista of distant desert mountains and a large, empty billboard structure. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the billboard and glides under a highway gantry with SOCAL directional signs, while concrete barriers give way to metal guardrails. Finally, the view opens onto a straight stretch of highway flanked by guardrails, heading deeper into the Badlands under a clear blue sky with scattered clouds.
